scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('dist/index.html')) fs.copyFileSync('dist/index.html', 'dist/index.php'); if (fs.existsSync('dist/assets')) { if (fs.existsSync('assets')) fs.rmSync('assets', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync('dist/assets', 'assets', { recursive: true }); }"
